description: God's judgments and Christ the rider on the white horse
mustContain: For He has judged the great prostitute
He who sat on it is called Faithful and True
His eyes are a flame of fire
Out of His mouth proceeds a sharp, double-edged sword
Him who sat on the horse
mustNotContain: For he has judged the great prostitute
